partial_progress.details: Phase D completed: LinearOrder on quotient, fragmentFMCS with sorry-free forward_F/backward_P. Phase E in progress: enriched chain building blocks (fragmentFSucc, enriched_seed_consistent_from_F) done. Remaining: FPClosure construction, Int embedding, pullback FMCS Int.

phases_detail.C: COMPLETED - Forward_F and backward_P within fragment
phases_detail.D: COMPLETED - Antisymmetrization, LinearOrder, fragmentFMCS with sorry-free F/P
phases_detail.E: IN PROGRESS - Enriched chain building blocks done, FPClosure + embedding remaining
phases_detail.F: NOT STARTED - FMCS Int via pullback
phases_detail.G: NOT STARTED - BFMCS and modal saturation
phases_detail.H: NOT STARTED - Truth lemma and completeness

completion_data.completion_summary: Phases A-D completed. Fragment-level FMCS with sorry-free forward_F/backward_P proven. Key lemma enriched_seed_consistent_from_F resolves F-persistence problem. Phase E (Int embedding) in progress with building blocks done.
